tasks.label: Build test
tasks.command: clang++ -std=c++17 -I"${workspaceFolder}" -o "${workspaceFolder}/test" "${workspaceFolder}/app/Main.cpp" "${workspaceFolder}/app/Runtime.cpp" "${workspaceFolder}/core/collectors/EventCollectorFactory.cpp" "${workspaceFolder}/core/guard/Guard.cpp" $(if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then find "${workspaceFolder}/platform/macos" -name '*.cpp' -type f; else find "${workspaceFolder}" -name '*.cpp' -type f ! -path '*/platform/macos/*' ! -name 'EventCollector.cpp' ! -name 'TdhHelpers.cpp'; fi) $(if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then printf '%s' ' -lcurl'; fi)
